apis.description: Get details about a single new quiz.

operations.notes: Get details about a single new quiz.

parameters.name: course_id
parameters.description: no description

parameters.name: assignment_id
parameters.description: The id of the assignment associated with the quiz.

apis.description: Get a list of new quizzes.

operations.notes: Get a list of new quizzes.

parameters.name: course_id
parameters.description: no description

apis.description: Create a new quiz for the course.

operations.notes: Create a new quiz for the course.

parameters.name: course_id
parameters.description: no description

parameters.name: quiz[title]
parameters.description: The title of the quiz.

parameters.name: quiz[assignment_group_id]
parameters.description: The ID of the quiz's assignment group.

parameters.name: quiz[points_possible]
parameters.description: The total point value given to the quiz. Must be positive.

parameters.name: quiz[due_at]
parameters.description: When the quiz is due.

parameters.name: quiz[lock_at]
parameters.description: When to lock the quiz.

parameters.name: quiz[unlock_at]
parameters.description: When to unlock the quiz.

parameters.name: quiz[grading_type]
parameters.description: The type of grading the assignment receives.

parameters.name: quiz[instructions]
parameters.description: Instructions for the quiz.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][calculator_type]
parameters.description:
Specifies which type of Calculator a student can use during Quiz taking.
Should be null if no calculator is allowed.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][filter_ip_address]
parameters.description: Whether IP filtering is needed.  Must be true for filters to take effect.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][filters][ips]
parameters.description:
Specifies ranges of IP addresses where the quiz can be taken from. Each range is an array like
[start address, end address], or null if there's no restriction.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][multiple_attempts][multiple_attempts_enabled]
parameters.description: Whether multiple attempts for this quiz is true.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][multiple_attempts][attempt_limit]
parameters.description: Whether there is an attempt limit.  Only set if multiple_attempts_enabled is true.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][multiple_attempts][max_attempts]
parameters.description:
The allowed attempts a student can take. If null, the allowed attempts are unlimited.  Only used if
attempt_limit is true.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][multiple_attempts][score_to_keep]
parameters.description: Whichever score to keep for the attempts.  Only used if multiple_attempts_enabled is true.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][multiple_attempts][cooling_period]
parameters.description: Whether there is a cooling (waiting) period.  Only used if multiple_attempts_enabled is true.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][multiple_attempts][cooling_period_seconds]
parameters.description:
Required waiting period in seconds between attempts. If null, there is no required time. Only used if
cooling_period is true

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][one_at_a_time_type]
parameters.description: Specifies the settings for questions to display when quiz taking.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][allow_backtracking]
parameters.description: Whether to allow user to return to previous questions when 'one_at_a_time_type' is set to 'question'.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][results_view_settings][result_view_restricted]
parameters.description: Whether the results view is restricted for students.  Must be true for any student restrictions to be set

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][results_view_settings][display_points_awarded]
parameters.description: Whether points are shown. Must set result_view_restricted to true to use this parameter.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][results_view_settings][display_points_possible]
parameters.description: Whether points possible is shown. Must set result_view_restricted to true to use this parameter.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][results_view_settings][display_items]
parameters.description: Whether to show items in the results view.  Must be true for any items restrictions to be set

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][results_view_settings][display_item_response]
parameters.description:
Whether item response is shown.  Only set if display_items is true.  Must be true for
display_item_response_correctness to be set.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][results_view_settings][display_item_response_correctness]
parameters.description:
Whether item correctness is shown.  Only set if display_item_response is true.  Must be true for
display_item_correct_answer to be set.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][results_view_settings][display_item_correct_answer]
parameters.description: Whether correct answer is shown.  Only set if display_item_response_correctness is true

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][results_view_settings][display_item_feedback]
parameters.description: Whether Item feedback is shown.  Only set if display_items is true

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][shuffle_answers]
parameters.description: Whether answers should be shuffled for students.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][shuffle_questions]
parameters.description: Whether questions should be shuffled for students.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][require_student_access_code]
parameters.description: Whether an access code is needed to take the quiz.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][student_access_code]
parameters.description: Access code to restrict quiz access. Should be null if no restriction.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][has_time_limit]
parameters.description: Whether there is a time limit for the quiz.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][session_time_limit_in_seconds]
parameters.description: Limit the time a student can work on the quiz. Should be null if no restriction.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][multiple_attempts][attempt_limit]

The allowed attempts a student can take. If null, the allowed attempts are unlimited. Only used if

parameters.description: Whichever score to keep for the attempts. Only used if multiple_attempts_enabled is true.

Required waiting period in seconds between attempts. If null, there is no required time.  Only used if

parameters.description: Whether to allow user to return to previous questions when 'one_at_a_time_type' is set to 'question'.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][results_view_settings][display_points_awarded]
parameters.description: Whether points are shown.  Must set result_view_restricted to true to use this parameter.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][results_view_settings][display_points_possible]
parameters.description: Whether points possible is shown. Must set result_view_restricted to true to use this parameter.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][results_view_settings][display_items]
parameters.description: Whether to show items in the results view.  Must be true for any items restrictions to be set.

parameters.description:
Whether item response is shown.  Only set if display_items is true.  Must be true for
display_item_response_correctness to be set.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][results_view_settings][display_item_response_correctness]
parameters.description:
Whether item correctness is shown.  Only set if display_item_response is true.  Must be true for
display_item_correct_answer to be set.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][results_view_settings][display_item_correct_answer]
parameters.description: Whether correct answer is shown.  Only set if display_item_response_correctness is true.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][results_view_settings][display_item_feedback]
parameters.description: Whether Item feedback is shown. Only set if display_items is true.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][shuffle_answers]
parameters.description: Whether answers should be shuffled for students.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][shuffle_questions]
parameters.description: Whether questions should be shuffled for students.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][require_student_access_code]
parameters.description: Whether an access code is needed to take the quiz.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][student_access_code]
parameters.description: Access code to restrict quiz access. Should be null if no restriction.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][has_time_limit]
parameters.description: Whether there is a time limit for the quiz.

parameters.name: quiz[quiz_settings][session_time_limit_in_seconds]
parameters.description: Limit the time a student can work on the quiz. Should be null if no restriction.

parameters.name: course_id
parameters.description: no description

parameters.name: assignment_id
parameters.description: The id of the assignment associated with the quiz.

assignment_group_id.description: the ID of the quiz's assignment group

points_possible.description: The total point value given to the quiz

published.description: whether the quiz has a published or unpublished draft state

grading_type.description: the type of grading the assignment receives ('pass_fail', 'percent', 'letter_grade', 'gpa_scale', or 'points')

calculator_type.description: type of calculator the user will have access to during the quiz ('none', basic' or 'scientific')

filter_ip_address.description: whether access to the quiz should be restricted to the IP address ranges described in 'filters'

filters.description: IP address ranges from which users can take the quiz, if 'filter_ip_address' is true

one_at_a_time_type.description: whether questions should be shown all at once ('none') or one-at-a-time ('question')

allow_backtracking.description: whether to allow user to return to previous questions when 'one_at_a_time_type' is set to 'question'

shuffle_answers.description: whether answers should be shuffled during quiz

shuffle_questions.description: whether questions should be shuffled during quiz

require_student_access_code.description: whether to require an access code to take the quiz (set as 'student_access_code')

student_access_code.description: access code that is required to take the quiz if 'require_student_access_code' is true

has_time_limit.description: whether the quiz has a time limit (set as 'session_time_limit_in_seconds')

session_time_limit_in_seconds.description: time limit during the quiz (in seconds)

multiple_attempts.description: settings to configure multiple quiz attempts (see MultipleAttemptsSettings)

result_view_settings.description: settings to restrict student result view (see ResultViewSettings)

attempt_limit.description: whether to limit the number of attempts if 'multiple_attempts_enabled' is true. Unlimited attempts if false.

max_attempts.description: number of attempts to allow if 'multiple_attempts_enabled' and 'attempt_limit' are true

score_to_keep.description: specifies which score to keep after attempts ('average', 'first', 'highest', or 'latest')

cooling_period.description: whether to enforce a waiting period after an attempt (set as 'cooling_period_seconds')

cooling_period_seconds.description: required waiting period (in seconds) between attempts. Enforced if 'cooling_period' is true.

result_view_restricted.description: whether to restrict the student result view

display_points_awarded.description: whether to show points awarded (overall and per question), if 'result_view_restricted' is true

display_points_possible.description: whether to show points possible (overall and per question), if 'result_view_restricted' is true

display_items.description: whether to show questions in the result view, if 'result_view_restricted' is true

display_item_response.description: whether to show student's responses in the result view, if 'display_items' is true

display_item_response_correctness.description: whether to indicate whether the student's response is correct/incorrect, if 'display_item_response' is true

display_item_correct_answer.description: whether to show the correct answer for each question, if 'display_item_response_correctness' is true

display_item_feedback.description: whether to show feedback for each item, if 'display_items' is true
